nodes.name: LLM Classify & Extract
nodes.notes: Create an HTTP Header Auth credential. Header name: x-goog-api-key. Value: your Gemini API key.

nodes.name: Telegram Notify
nodes.notes: Create a Telegram credential in n8n and set TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID or replace this placeholder.

nodes.name: Google Sheets Webhook
nodes.notes: Deploy scripts/google-sheets-apps-script.js as a Google Apps Script Web App and paste its /exec URL here.

parameters.content:
### Email / Lead Intake Automation
Public template. Configure Gmail, Gemini, Telegram, and Google Sheets credentials before activating.

Flow: Gmail Trigger or manual webhook -> Normalize -> Gemini structured JSON -> Is Lead -> Telegram -> Google Sheets -> webhook response.

No personal credentials are included in this repository.
